metaTitle: QR Code Generator — Create Free QR Codes for URL, Wi-Fi, Text (Private & Offline)
metaDescription: Generate high-quality QR codes instantly in your browser. No data is sent to servers. Supports URL, Wi-Fi, Email, and Text. Download as PNG or SVG for free.

howto.description: Select from URL, Text, Email, or Wi-Fi tabs depending on what you want to encode.
Type your URL, message, email address, or Wi-Fi credentials into the input field. The QR code updates instantly.
Always scan the generated QR code with your phone camera to ensure it leads to the correct destination before printing.
Download as PNG for standard digital use or SVG for high-quality printing and scalable vector graphics.

why: No upload — everything runs in your browser
Multiple formats: URL, Text, Email, Wi-Fi
Save as PNG or SVG for any use case
Works offline after initial page load
Privacy first: Your data never leaves your device
Perfect for business cards, menus, and marketing materials

faq.q: Is my data safe when generating a QR code?
faq.a: Yes, 100%. Unlike other online generators, our tool creates the QR code entirely within your browser. Your URL, Wi-Fi password, or messages are never sent to our servers. It works completely offline for maximum privacy.

faq.q: What's the difference between PNG and SVG?
faq.a: PNG is a raster image best for digital use and printing at fixed sizes. SVG is a vector format that scales infinitely without quality loss, ideal for large-scale prints like banners or posters.

faq.q: Can I create a QR code for Wi-Fi?
faq.a: Yes! Switch to the Wi-Fi tab, enter your network name (SSID), password, and security type. Anyone scanning the code can connect to your network instantly.

faq.q: Is there a limit to QR code content?
faq.a: QR codes work best with shorter content (under 300 characters). Very long content creates highly complex codes that might be harder for some older cameras to scan quickly.
No. The QR codes generated here are 'Static', meaning the data is hardcoded into the pattern. They never expire. However, if the destination URL changes later, the code cannot be updated.

faq.q: Can I customize the QR code design?
faq.a: This tool generates clean, high-contrast black-and-white QR codes for maximum scannability. You can download the SVG file and edit it in design software to add your own colors or logos.
